title: Quantum Lab
description: From-scratch quantum lab in TypeScript: state-vector AND density-matrix engines, Kraus noise channels, a complex Hermitian eigensolver, Bloch spheres, error-correcting codes (bit-flip/phase-flip/9-qubit Shor), phase estimation, VQE & QAOA with a built-in optimizer, OpenQASM export, and a live self-test suite.
